description: 咨询行业 extension ontology 数据，覆盖咨询项目、业务实践、方法论、交付物、客户关系、知识管理与人才配置
description_en: Consulting Industry and Domain Extension ontology covering engagements, practice lines, methodologies, deliverables, client relationships, knowledge management, and talent allocation

classes.definition: 提供专业咨询服务的企业主体，如管理咨询、IT咨询、战略咨询等
classes.definition_en: An enterprise entity providing professional consulting services such as management consulting, IT consulting, and strategy consulting

classes.definition: 咨询公司按地理区域设立的分支办公室，如北京办公室、纽约办公室等
classes.definition_en: A branch office set up by a consulting firm in a geographic region, e.g. Beijing office, New York office

classes.definition: 咨询公司按行业或职能划分的业务实践领域，如战略、运营、数字化转型、人力资源等
classes.definition_en: A practice area organized by industry or function within a consulting firm, such as strategy, operations, digital transformation, and human resources

classes.definition: 围绕特定专业能力或技术方向组建的跨项目支持中心
classes.definition_en: A cross-project support center organized around a specific professional competency or technology domain

classes.definition: 与客户签订合同后的咨询服务交付项目，包含范围、时间、预算和团队
classes.definition_en: A consulting service delivery project contracted with a client, encompassing scope, timeline, budget, and team

classes.definition: 咨询项目中与交付和付款绑定的关键里程碑节点
classes.definition_en: A key milestone node in a consulting engagement tied to deliverables and payment schedules

classes.definition: 面向客户的项目建议书或竞标方案，包含方法论、团队、时间表和报价
classes.definition_en: A project proposal or bid document for clients, containing methodology, team composition, timeline, and pricing

classes.definition: 定义项目范围、交付物、时间线和验收标准的正式合同附件
classes.definition_en: A formal contract attachment defining project scope, deliverables, timeline, and acceptance criteria

classes.definition: 咨询项目中需交付给客户的成果物，如报告、模型、实施方案、工具包等
classes.definition_en: An output to be delivered to the client in a consulting engagement, such as reports, models, implementation plans, and toolkits

classes.definition: 咨询项目内按主题划分的并行工作模块，各自拥有独立交付目标
classes.definition_en: A parallel work module within an engagement organized by theme, each with independent delivery objectives

classes.definition: 咨询项目中常见的互动式研讨会或工作坊交付形式，用于调研、共创或汇报
classes.definition_en: An interactive seminar or workshop delivery format commonly used in consulting engagements for research, co-creation, or reporting

classes.definition: 咨询公司自主研发或引用的标准化方法论框架，如设计思维、精益六西格玛、TOGAF等
classes.definition_en: A standardized methodology framework developed or adopted by a consulting firm, such as Design Thinking, Lean Six Sigma, TOGAF, etc.

classes.definition: 用于问题分析和战略规划的结构化工具，如波特五力、SWOT、价值链分析、BCG矩阵等
classes.definition_en: A structured tool for problem analysis and strategic planning, such as Porter's Five Forces, SWOT, Value Chain Analysis, BCG Matrix, etc.

classes.definition: 咨询公司积累的可复用知识，包括案例库、行业报告、最佳实践、工具模板等
classes.definition_en: Reusable knowledge accumulated by a consulting firm, including case libraries, industry reports, best practices, and tool templates

classes.definition: 过往项目的结构化总结，用于知识沉淀、业务开发和品牌展示
classes.definition_en: A structured summary of past engagements used for knowledge retention, business development, and brand showcase

classes.definition: 咨询公司维护的客户主体记录，跟踪关系历史、项目记录和收入贡献
classes.definition_en: A client entity record maintained by a consulting firm, tracking relationship history, engagement records, and revenue contribution

classes.definition: 与客户之间的长期战略合作关系，包含信任层级、接触频率和商机管道
classes.definition_en: A long-term strategic partnership with a client, encompassing trust levels, contact frequency, and opportunity pipeline

classes.definition: 潜在咨询项目的销售漏斗，跟踪从线索识别到签约的全流程
classes.definition_en: A sales funnel of potential consulting engagements, tracking the full process from lead identification to contract signing

classes.definition: 咨询公司对外提供的标准化或定制化服务产品，如战略评估、组织诊断、数字化路线图等
classes.definition_en: Standardized or customized service offerings provided by a consulting firm, such as strategic assessment, organizational diagnostics, and digital roadmaps

classes.definition: 对客户关系、项目质量和营收目标负最终责任的高级领导角色
classes.definition_en: A senior leadership role bearing ultimate responsibility for client relationships, engagement quality, and revenue targets

classes.definition: 介于合伙人和经理之间的高级顾问角色，负责项目群管理和业务拓展
classes.definition_en: A senior advisory role between partner and manager, responsible for program management and business development

classes.definition: 负责单个项目日常管理、团队协调和客户沟通的角色
classes.definition_en: A role responsible for day-to-day management, team coordination, and client communication for a single engagement

classes.definition: 执行具体分析、调研、方案设计和交付工作的专业角色
classes.definition_en: A professional role performing specific analysis, research, solution design, and delivery work

classes.definition: 负责数据收集、分析建模和材料准备的初级角色
classes.definition_en: A junior role responsible for data collection, analytical modeling, and material preparation

classes.definition: 在特定行业或职能领域拥有深度专长的顾问角色，提供专家意见和质量把关
classes.definition_en: An advisory role with deep expertise in a specific industry or functional domain, providing expert opinions and quality assurance

classes.definition: 由外部合作方或独立顾问承担的项目分包角色，按合同提供专项服务
classes.definition_en: A project subcontracting role undertaken by external partners or independent consultants, providing specialized services under contract

classes.definition: 客户组织中与咨询项目相关的关键干系人，包括项目负责人、业务负责人、IT负责人等
classes.definition_en: Key stakeholders within the client organization related to the consulting engagement, including project leads, business owners, and IT leaders

classes.definition: 客户方为咨询项目提供预算审批和高层支持的行政发起人角色
classes.definition_en: An executive sponsor on the client side who provides budget approval and senior-level support for the consulting engagement

classes.definition: 项目团队组建中对特定技能、经验和可用性的人力需求申请
classes.definition_en: A human resource request specifying required skills, experience, and availability for project team assembly

classes.definition: 衡量顾问可计费时间与总工时比率的核心运营指标
classes.definition_en: A core operational metric measuring the ratio of a consultant's billable hours to total working hours

classes.definition: 衡量咨询公司、业务线或项目层面收入表现的财务指标
classes.definition_en: A financial metric measuring revenue performance at the firm, practice line, or engagement level

classes.definition: 衡量项目或业务线利润率的财务指标，反映交付效率和定价策略的有效性
classes.definition_en: A financial metric measuring profit margin at the engagement or practice line level, reflecting delivery efficiency and pricing strategy effectiveness

classes.definition: 按顾问等级、项目类型和客户协议确定的小时/天计费标准规则
classes.definition_en: A billing standard rule determined by consultant grade, engagement type, and client agreement for hourly or daily rates

classes.definition: 项目交付过程中的质量关口和审核机制，确保交付物达标
classes.definition_en: Quality gates and review mechanisms during engagement delivery to ensure deliverables meet standards

classes.definition: 项目结束后收集的客户反馈，衡量服务质量和客户体验
classes.definition_en: Client feedback collected after engagement completion, measuring service quality and client experience

classes.definition: 咨询公司发布的行业洞察白皮书、研究报告和观点文章，用于品牌建设和客户吸引
classes.definition_en: Industry insight white papers, research reports, and opinion articles published by a consulting firm for brand building and client attraction

classes.definition: 咨询项目中为客户制定的组织变革和人员转型方案
classes.definition_en: An organizational change and personnel transformation plan developed for clients within a consulting engagement

classes.definition: 基于行业数据和最佳实践的性能对标分析报告
classes.definition_en: A performance benchmarking analysis report based on industry data and best practices

classes.definition: 同时服务竞争客户或关联方可能导致的利益冲突和声誉风险
classes.definition_en: A risk of conflicts and reputational damage arising from simultaneously serving competing clients or related parties

classes.definition: 项目执行过程中需求范围不断扩大但未相应调整预算和时间的风险
classes.definition_en: A risk of requirements scope expanding during engagement execution without corresponding adjustments to budget and timeline

classes.definition: 确保咨询建议客观中立的内部治理政策，特别适用于审计和风控领域
classes.definition_en: An internal governance policy ensuring objectivity and neutrality of consulting advice, particularly applicable to audit and risk management domains

classes.definition: 规范客户信息、项目数据和商业机密保护要求的信息安全政策
classes.definition_en: An information security policy governing the protection of client information, engagement data, and trade secrets

classes.definition: 识别商机、建立客户关系和转化签约的市场拓展能力
classes.definition_en: A market expansion capability for identifying opportunities, building client relationships, and converting leads into signed engagements

classes.definition: 对项目经验、行业知识和方法论的系统化收集、整理、分享与复用能力
classes.definition_en: A systematic capability for collecting, organizing, sharing, and reusing engagement experiences, industry knowledge, and methodologies

classes.definition: 咨询人才的选拔、培养、评估和晋升体系能力，是咨询公司核心竞争力
classes.definition_en: A capability encompassing the selection, development, evaluation, and promotion of consulting talent, representing a core competitive advantage

classes.definition: 利用数据分析、AI、自动化工具提升交付效率和成果质量的能力
classes.definition_en: A capability leveraging data analytics, AI, and automation tools to enhance delivery efficiency and output quality

classes.definition: 根据项目需求匹配和调配顾问资源的流程
classes.definition_en: A process for matching and allocating consultant resources based on engagement requirements

classes.definition: 从项目启动、调研分析、方案设计到最终交付的端到端流程
classes.definition_en: An end-to-end process from engagement kickoff, research and analysis, solution design, to final delivery

classes.definition: 从市场情报、客户接洽、需求识别到提案竞标的商机转化流程
classes.definition_en: An opportunity conversion process from market intelligence, client outreach, requirements identification, to proposal and bidding

classes.definition: 项目结束后的知识提炼、案例总结和经验入库流程
classes.definition_en: A post-engagement process for knowledge extraction, case summarization, and experience archiving

classes.definition: 管理客户信息、商机追踪和关系维护的系统平台
classes.definition_en: A system platform for managing client information, opportunity tracking, and relationship maintenance

classes.definition: 存储和检索方法论、案例库、行业报告和最佳实践的知识平台
classes.definition_en: A knowledge platform for storing and retrieving methodologies, case libraries, industry reports, and best practices

classes.definition: 跟踪顾问技能、可用性和项目分配的人员配置系统
classes.definition_en: A staffing system tracking consultant skills, availability, and engagement assignments

classes.definition: 记录顾问计费时间和费用报销的工时系统
classes.definition_en: A time management system for recording consultant billable hours and expense reimbursements

relations.definition: 咨询公司拥有业务实践领域
relations.definition_en: A consulting firm has a practice line

relations.definition: 咨询公司设立能力中心
relations.definition_en: A consulting firm establishes a competency center

relations.definition: 咨询公司设立分支办公室
relations.definition_en: A consulting firm has a branch office

relations.definition: 咨询公司服务客户
relations.definition_en: A consulting firm serves a client

relations.definition: 合伙人管理客户关系
relations.definition_en: A partner manages a client relationship

relations.definition: 合伙人领导咨询项目
relations.definition_en: A partner leads an engagement

relations.definition: 项目经理管理咨询项目日常
relations.definition_en: An engagement manager manages the day-to-day operations of an engagement

relations.definition: 顾问被配置到咨询项目
relations.definition_en: A consultant is staffed on an engagement

relations.definition: 咨询项目拥有团队成员（staffed_on 的逆关系）
relations.definition_en: An engagement has a team member (inverse of staffed_on)

relations.definition: 领域专家为项目提供专业支持
relations.definition_en: A subject matter expert provides expertise to an engagement

relations.definition: 咨询项目将部分工作分包给外部顾问
relations.definition_en: An engagement subcontracts work to an external consultant

relations.definition: 咨询项目服务于客户
relations.definition_en: An engagement is engaged by a client

relations.definition: 咨询项目由客户发起人提供高层支持
relations.definition_en: An engagement is sponsored by a client executive sponsor

relations.definition: 客户账户拥有关键干系人
relations.definition_en: A client account has key stakeholders

relations.definition: 项目范围由工作说明书定义
relations.definition_en: An engagement's scope is defined by a statement of work

relations.definition: 项目通过提案赢得
relations.definition_en: An engagement is won through a proposal

relations.definition: 项目包含工作模块
relations.definition_en: An engagement contains work streams

relations.definition: 咨询项目包含关键里程碑
relations.definition_en: An engagement has key milestones

relations.definition: 咨询项目中开展工作坊活动
relations.definition_en: An engagement conducts workshop activities

relations.definition: 工作模块产出交付物
relations.definition_en: A work stream produces deliverables

relations.definition: 项目应用方法论
relations.definition_en: An engagement applies a methodology

relations.definition: 交付物使用分析框架
relations.definition_en: A deliverable uses an analytical framework

relations.definition: 顾问满足人员配置需求
relations.definition_en: A consultant fulfills a staffing request

relations.definition: 客户关系产生商机管道
relations.definition_en: A client relationship generates a pipeline opportunity

relations.definition: 商机转化为签约项目
relations.definition_en: A pipeline opportunity converts into a signed engagement

relations.definition: 交付物经过质量评审
relations.definition_en: A deliverable is reviewed through quality review

relations.definition: 项目通过客户满意度调查评估
relations.definition_en: An engagement is assessed by a client satisfaction survey

relations.definition: 项目经验沉淀为知识资产
relations.definition_en: An engagement contributes to knowledge assets

relations.definition: 项目记录为案例研究
relations.definition_en: An engagement is documented as a case study

relations.definition: 业务线发布思想领导力内容
relations.definition_en: A practice line publishes thought leadership content

relations.definition: 交付物使用对标研究支撑
relations.definition_en: A deliverable is benchmarked against a benchmark study

relations.definition: 项目包含变革管理计划
relations.definition_en: An engagement includes a change management plan

relations.definition: 咨询项目面临的风险，包括利益冲突、范围蔓延等各类风险
relations.definition_en: Risks faced by an engagement, including conflict of interest, scope creep, and other risk types

relations.definition: 咨询项目受治理政策约束，包括独立性政策、保密政策等
relations.definition_en: An engagement is governed by policies, including independence policy, confidentiality policy, etc.

relations.definition: 顾问绩效由利用率指标衡量
relations.definition_en: Consultant performance is measured by utilization metrics

relations.definition: 业务线业绩由收入指标衡量
relations.definition_en: Practice line performance is measured by revenue metrics

relations.definition: 顾问按照费率标准计费
relations.definition_en: A consultant is billed at a specific billable rate

relations.definition: 客户账户在CRM系统中管理
relations.definition_en: A client account is tracked in the CRM system

relations.definition: 知识资产存储于知识管理门户
relations.definition_en: Knowledge assets are stored in the knowledge portal

relations.definition: 人员配置通过资源管理系统调度
relations.definition_en: Staffing requests are scheduled through the resource management system

relations.definition: 项目工时在工时管理系统中记录
relations.definition_en: Engagement hours are logged in the time tracking system

relations.definition: 业务开发能力由业务开发流程实现
relations.definition_en: Business development capability is realized by the business development process

relations.definition: 知识管理能力由知识沉淀流程实现
relations.definition_en: Knowledge management capability is realized by the knowledge capture process

relations.definition: 人才发展能力由人员配置流程实现
relations.definition_en: Talent development capability is realized by the staffing process

relations.definition: 数字化交付能力由项目交付流程实现
relations.definition_en: Digital delivery capability is realized by the engagement delivery process

sample_instances.label: Digital Transformation Roadmap for Manufacturing Co.
